title: T-045 — Production settings, OEE target and taxonomy server actions
prompt:
# T-045 — Production settings, OEE target and taxonomy server actions

PRD/UX refs: SCR-08-10, MODAL-08-15, UX PROD-011

Goal: Implement settings forms backing production settings, OEE target effective-date windows, downtime/waste taxonomies and D365 push toggles.

Implementation details:
Create server actions and zod schemas for consumption tolerance, yield thresholds, catch-weight settings, downtime/waste taxonomy maintenance, OEE targets with non-overlapping effective windows, and D365 push toggles. Use 02-SETTINGS registry/flags for global integration settings where required; Production settings can read but must not own D365 connection secrets.

Scope files:
- packages/api-services/production/settings.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/production/settings/actions.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production-settings.ts [modify]

Acceptance criteria:
1. OEE target saves reject overlapping effective windows
2. Downtime/waste taxonomies can be listed and modified with audit events
3. D365 push toggles are read/written only through approved Settings flag path

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.
